summary: Russian forces using the "Rubicon" Center conducted strikes in Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman, destroying Ukrainian artillery (2S22 "Bogdan," M109), a T-64BV tank, and personnel. FPV drones intercepted over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, including 343 Leleka-100 and 132 Furya models. A FAB-3000 bomb strike with UMPK on Ukrainian positions in Krasny Liman was captured via optical fiber FPV drone "KVN." Ukraine faces a fiber optic shortage, while Russia’s domestic production was destroyed, leaving it dependent on Chinese supplies. Ukrainian forces evacuated a wounded soldier on the Pokrovsk axis.
